title.en: Once the fusion is successful, Xiao Yue will be...

content.en:
Ye Tian had passed on the Ancestral Law to Xiao Yue and they had been for many years, and they had not been able to fuse the Ancestral Law so quickly, but Ye Tian had often guided them over the years.

After all, these Ancestor Laws were created by Ye Tian, so he was the one who understood these Ancestor Methods the most, in order to make his relatives become Ancestors faster, Ye Tiancai often guided them, thus shortening the time for them to become Ancestors many times.

Otherwise, they would need at least hundreds of realm years before they could be expected to merge with the Ancestor Law to become an Ancestor.

Another realm year has passed, and on this day, Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, is about to merge with the Ancestor Law of Light.

Once the fusion is successful, Xiao Yue will become an Ancestor of Light.

At this time.

Xiao Yue and the others had all returned to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm to retreat and cultivate, so with the protection of Ye Tian's body, she would break through to become an ancestor, and she would definitely not be disturbed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Xiao Yue had successfully fused the Ancestor Law of Light and was breaking through the Ancestor Realm, countless energies poured into her body, and the entire Dao Mountain Realm and even the surrounding Dark Forbidden Domain were in the Ancestor Vision.

The great event of the ancestor breakthrough shook time and space, so it couldn't be concealed at all, and many ancestors felt it.

Suddenly, a Ancestor Mind crossed time and space to descend on the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, and they did not dare to directly break into the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, but they sensed the situation.

"Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, someone has broken through to the Ancestor Realm, who is it?"

The Ancestors were shocked.

Isn't Ye Tian the only one in the human race, and even the ancestor of Aoba is also Ye Tian's clone.

Therefore, there is no second Superior Domain Ancestor among the human race who is qualified to attack the Ancestor!

Although there are many non-superior domain ancestors of the human race, there are even strong people who are at the peak of the non-superior domain ancestors.

But these Ancestors were very aware of the difficulty of impacting the Ancestors, and they could either create the Ancestor Method by themselves, or merge with the Fallen Ancestor's Ownerless Ancestor Method.

However, there were only so many fallen ancestors, and almost all of their ancestral methods were fused again, so it was too difficult and too difficult to obtain a new ancestral method.

As for the self-founding ancestor method, not everyone is as demonic as Ye Tian.

Moreover, the Ancestor could not create the Ancestor Law by himself, because he couldn't get rid of his own Ancestor Law, and it would be too difficult to create an Ancestor Law that was different from his own Ancestor Dao.

Even the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor couldn't create the Second Ancestor Method, so they couldn't help others become Ancestors.

Therefore, they couldn't understand how the human race could suddenly give birth to another ancestor.

"Realm Ancestor, do you know who the Terran broke through to the Ancestor?"

The Eternal Master asked curiously.

Realm Ancestor shook his head: "To be honest, I am also very shocked, among the human race, only the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws is the ancestor of our battle gate, and the other human races are not disciples of the war gate, so I don't know much about the human race. It is said that it is known that the other topless domain ancestors of the human race are not qualified to become the ancestors, so there is only one possibility, the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws has obtained a masterless ancestor method, allowing a Terran no superior peak domain ancestor to fuse into the ancestor realm. "

"Good luck!"

The Ancestor of Destruction was a little jealous

The complete ancestor method of the ownerless, even he can't get it.

Although he was sure to kill a weaker ancestor, that ancestor would not create the ancestor method for him, unless the ancestor was willing, he would not be able to get the other party's ancestor method at all.

However, there are not many ancestors who are willing to make the Ancestral Method.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

At this time, Xiao Yue successfully broke through to the Ancestor Realm, although her combat power was not very strong, she was also a true Ancestor.

After Xiao Yue's breakthrough was successful, he showed up and gave himself the name of the ancestor: Yuezu!

At this time, the other ancestors knew that the person who broke through to the ancestor was the wife of Ye Tian, the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws.

It is extremely rare for both husband and wife to be ancestors.

Many ancestors are not married, and some ancestors are married, but their wives have already fallen, or their strength is very low, and they can't withstand the hardships of the long years, and they fall asleep.

Therefore, these ancestors were very jealous of Ye Tian.

But it can't be helped, no matter how jealous it is, it's useless.

The human race gave birth to a new ancestor, plus Ye Tian alone is equivalent to the three great ancestors, so it is equivalent to having the four great ancestors.

With Ye Tian's strength, the human race was almost comparable to the Destruction Saint Clan.

Another half of the realm year has passed, and on this day, the human race has become the object of attention of many ancestors.

It's just because the human race has given birth to another ancestor!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Xingchen broke through and was stepping into the Ancestor Realm, and countless forbidden energies poured into his body, helping him refine his body and condense the Ancestor Body.

Soon, the ancestors arrived again, dumbfounded.

"How can this be, how did the Terran give birth to another ancestor, it can't be that he was lucky enough to get the Ownerless Ancestor Law again, there is definitely something wrong with the Terran!!"

The Ancestor of Time and Space was shocked.

"Could it be that the Terrans have mastered the method to break through to the Ancestor without the need for the Ancestor Method?"

There is speculation about the ancestors.

"Impossible, the Ancestor Law is the only way to become an Ancestor, otherwise there is no way to become an Ancestor, maybe it is really the luck of the human race that has obtained two masterless Ancestor Laws!"

Another ancestor said.

At this time, many ancestors were jealous and crazy, if it weren't for Ye Tian's strength being too strong, they would really break into the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm and explore the secrets of the human race.

Millions of years later, Ye Xingchen officially broke through and successfully entered the realm of the Ancestors, and called himself the Ancestor of the Stars.

Soon after, Ye Xingyue also broke through to the Ancestor Realm and called himself the Ancestor of Xingyue.

Ye Yu was a little slower, but after two realm years, he stepped into the realm of the Ancestor and called himself the Ancestor of the Rain.

Since then, all of Ye Tian's relatives have stepped into the realm of the ancestors.

And the Terran gave birth to several ancestors one after another, and anyone could see that the Terran was abnormal.

Ye Tian couldn't explain it, he said that he had created many ancestral laws, would others believe it?

Don't believe it at all!

Even if he really believed it, the other Ancestors would be very panicked, because he could keep creating the Ancestor Method, which was equivalent to being able to keep creating the Ancestors, which was even more terrifying!

this day.

Ye Tian and Jie Ancestor chatted together.

Abrupt.

The Realm Ancestor reminded, "Ten Thousand Law Ancestors, you have to be careful with some Holy Ancestors!"

"Be careful of the Holy Ancestor, why?"

Ye Tian frowned.

The Realm Ancestor was silent for a while, and finally said: "The Holy Ancestor is not simple, and your Terran Race has given birth to Ancestors one after another, the Saint Ancestor will feel that your Terran Race has a big secret, maybe it will be of great help to his strength, even if it doesn't help, if you master your secret, maybe you can continue to create Ancestors, so that the Dark Holy Gate can become a force that surpasses the Destruction Holy Clan." So, it's possible that he's going to do something to you. "

"I'm not afraid of just one Holy Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

After all, his strength had reached the combat power of the top ancestor, and he had reached the peak level of the top ancestor, and the average top ancestor was far from being his opponent.

"No, the strength of the Holy Ancestor may not be strong, but he knows the more terrifying Top Ancestor!!"

The Realm Ancestor has revealed a huge secret.
